name: e2e-skills
description: Four E2E skills that generate, audit, and debug Playwright and Cypress tests. Generates Playwright tests from scratch via live browser exploration and a Plan Mode approval gate. Audits Playwright, Cypress, and Puppeteer specs against 10 anti-patterns (P0/P1/P2). Debugs failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/ and Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.
